_comment: Curated per-piece facts. No status field — stage derives from pr + data/pr-states.json. held = authored-but-not-in-a-PR reason. Claims for pieces without a PR go in overrides.json.

pieces.note: 2 Tier-1-only (replace_image, unmerge_table_cells). Greptile addressed.
15 scope-gated calendar/ACL tools deferred (need Google app verification).
Tier A only. get_attachment Tier-1-only. Tier B (11) deferred — scope re-consent.
Tier-2 combined with google-tasks in #13937 (40/45 across both). 5 need a Workspace / are destructive.
Shipped in #13937 with google-drive; Tier-2 counted there (40/45 combined).
All shipped atomics live-verified.
Read-only. 9 create/edit atomics deferred — forms.body scope blocked on the unverified OAuth app.
Preserved upstream's 2 new actions; merged on top.
~8 adjacent atomics env-limited (file uploads, invite-link, callback) — twins of in-prod actions.
Part of 145/145 combined. 12 atomics deferred (paid plan / scopes / harness).
Zero deferrals — all 42 shipped & verified.
Core surface. Long-tail (goals/docs/chat/views) deferred; 6 atomics blocked (paid/Enterprise/UI-only).
get_extract_results deferred (no standalone extract id).
delete_dataset Tier-1-only (destructive).
3 attachment atomics deferred (form-data limit). remove_board_member is Tier-B.
send_message rewritten (form-data → JSON). list_thread_members deferred (GUILD_MEMBERS intent).
Held on disk, not in a PR. Send-only restricted key blocks 34 read/mgmt atomics. Needs a full-access key.
pieces.held: Held on disk, not in a PR. Send-only restricted key blocks 34 read/mgmt atomics. Needs a full-access key.

pieces.note: Wave 1 (2026-06-29), PR pending review. Test-mode key → money/email atomics verified safely. 8 Tier-2 bugs found+fixed. 4 more deferred (disputes/payouts + close_dispute) — see blockers.
Wave 1, PR pending review. PAT carries full scopes → all 'Tier-B' writes passed live. 1 more deferred (create_base_ai) — see blockers.
Wave 1, PR pending review. All 17 engine searches verified; 13 new engines added to the SerpApiEngine validator enum.
Wave 2 (core subset), PR pending review. 0 code bugs. Long-tail (Actions/Projects/Checks/...) + 2 env-gated deferred — see blockers.
Wave 3, PR pending review. Account had 2 bots → full conversation/document chain verified. 1 more deferred (upload_file_to_kb) — see blockers.
Wave 3 (Brevo). BLOCKED — seeded Brevo key returns 401 'Key not found'. 20 authored + Tier-1 green, 0 verifiable until a valid key is re-seeded.
pieces.held: Wave 3 (Brevo). BLOCKED — seeded Brevo key returns 401 'Key not found'. 20 authored + Tier-1 green, 0 verifiable until a valid key is re-seeded.

pieces.note: Wave 8 (2026-06-29/30), PR pending review. Seeded via seed_connections.py. 1 more deferred (delete_monitor — vendor 404 on both documented endpoints, unfixable) — see blockers.
Wave 8, PR pending review. All 5 ai twins live-verified; zero deferrals.
Wave 8, PR pending review. 3 more deferred (get_customer_by_id + create/update_customer — quiz_id has no in-piece resolver) — see blockers.
Wave 8, PR pending review. All 3 ai twins live-verified; zero deferrals.
Wave 8, PR pending review. 1 net-new (get_current_account). 3 pre-existing 'both' actions had a zod v3-vs-4 validateZod bug — fixed 2026-06-30 (940192c), now working for agents too.
